item.ironsbotany.botanical_focus.tooltip: A mystical curio that bridges natural and arcane mana
item.ironsbotany.livingwood_staff.toolti: A staff carved from living wood, channeling nature's spell power

item.ironsbotany.upgrade_orb.usage: Use in Arcane Anvil to upgrade equipment
item.ironsbotany.mana_infused_essence.to: Essence suffused with raw magical energy, used in botanical crafting
item.ironsbotany.botanical_crystal.toolt: A crystallized shard of botanical mana
item.ironsbotany.spell_petal.tooltip: A petal imbued with arcane potential, used in scroll forging
item.ironsbotany.botanical_grimoire.tool: A compendium of knowledge for the aspiring botanical mage
block.ironsbotany.spell_reservoir.toolti: Stores ISS mana and slowly replenishes nearby players
spell.ironsbotany.mana_bloom.description: Summons Botania mystical flowers on nearby ground. Flower count and range scale with level.
spell.ironsbotany.mana_bloom.guide: Summons Botania mystical flowers on nearby ground. Flower count and range scale with level.
spell.ironsbotany.botanical_burst.descri: Fires a botanical projectile that deals magic damage. Catalysts can add piercing or extra projectiles.
spell.ironsbotany.botanical_burst.guide: Fires a botanical projectile that deals magic damage. Catalysts can add piercing or extra projectiles.
spell.ironsbotany.flower_shield.descript: Creates a petal barrier that absorbs damage and grants Resistance. Shield HP scales with level.
spell.ironsbotany.flower_shield.guide: Creates a petal barrier that absorbs damage and grants Resistance. Shield HP scales with level.
spell.ironsbotany.living_root_grasp.desc: Roots nearby enemies in place, applying Slowness and Weakness.
spell.ironsbotany.living_root_grasp.guid: Roots nearby enemies in place, applying Slowness and Weakness.
spell.ironsbotany.spark_swarm.descriptio: Summons mana sparks that orbit and attack nearby enemies. Spark count scales with level.
spell.ironsbotany.spark_swarm.guide: Summons mana sparks that orbit and attack nearby enemies. Spark count scales with level.
spell.ironsbotany.runic_infusion.descrip: Grants Strength, Speed, and Regeneration. Carrying Botania runes in your inventory enhances the effect.
spell.ironsbotany.runic_infusion.guide: Grants Strength, Speed, and Regeneration. Carrying Botania runes in your inventory enhances the effect.
spell.ironsbotany.petal_storm.descriptio: Unleashes a spiral storm of petals that damages and knocks back nearby enemies.
spell.ironsbotany.petal_storm.guide: Unleashes a spiral storm of petals that damages and knocks back nearby enemies.
spell.ironsbotany.gaia_wrath.description: Channels the fury of Gaia to deal massive AoE damage, applying Wither, Weakness, and Slowness.
spell.ironsbotany.gaia_wrath.guide: Channels the fury of Gaia to deal massive AoE damage, applying Wither, Weakness, and Slowness.
spell.ironsbotany.mana_rebirth.descripti: Heals the caster, removes negative effects, and grants Regeneration and Absorption. Can prevent death at higher levels.
spell.ironsbotany.mana_rebirth.guide: Heals the caster, removes negative effects, and grants Regeneration and Absorption. Can prevent death at higher levels.
